subject: SOCDS 2025/26 Update Week #26 - PreK Orange
text:
Email Ms. Annemarie
PEP Fundraiser Updates
Bang Cookies
Thank you to all of the parents and families who participated in last month's fundraiser with Bang Cookies. We're excited to share that thanks to your efforts, we were able to raise $2,675! A big shout out to these top 5 contributors:
Mikaela Rigo
Erica Rosenthal
Fallon Sheppard
Cynthia Romano
Vanessa Averhoff
April Yard Sale
Additionally, PEP will host a Yard Sale in mid-April so please start putting aside your children's gently used clothing, accessories, and books. More details to come soon!
All funds raised through these initiatives support our broader SOCDS community through teacher appreciation lunches, celebration gifts for our incredible staff, food and beverages for parent gatherings and school events, and 
other ways we come together as a community throughout the year. Thank you everyone for your continued support!
Komitoms Wednesday
We are so excited that
Komitoms
were able to reschedule their musical presentation.  The snowstorm last week disrupted our plans, but they were able to fit us in this coming Wednesday.  We look forward to moving and grooving with them all.
Backwards - Inside Out Day
Monday March 9th
On Monday we will get dressed wearing our clothes backwards or Inside Out (or both!). This is in honor of Dr. Seuss'
Wacky Wednesday
(even though we are dressing up on a Monday!)
If you have any questions or concerns please text (1-646-226-8790) or email learn@socds.com.
Annemarie
Upcoming Dates
Monday, March 2nd - Purim
Wednesday, March 4th - Holi
Monday, March 9th - Backwards Inside Out Day
Wednesday, March 11th - Komitoms Music
Monday, March 16th - Hat Day
Thursday, March 19th - Celebrate Eid
Monday, March 23rd - Pajama Day
Monday, March 30th - School T-Shirt PEP Pizza Cupcake Lunch
Friday, April 3rd - Good Friday
SOCDS is Closed
Logistics
Dress Appropriately for the Weather:
Please dress your child in appropriate gear for the day.  In general (except this really, really cold weather) -- there is no bad weather just poor clothing.
Morning Snack
:  Please send in a morning, and if your child is staying for enrichment please send in an afternoon snack as well.  We generally allow children to choose their food and to listen to their bodies, but if you have any particular preference for what they eat and when, please just label the containers and we will accommodate.  Please remember we are a NUT FREE environment.
Water Bottles
:  Please send in a labeled water bottle with your child each 
day.  We do make sure that they drink water throughout the day.  We have two water fountains which we use to refill the bottles (so they may come home full.)
Parking:
Please remember that Vose Avenue is an active busy street.  Please pull up on the
school side
of Vose in front of the school.  It is safest to go around the block instead of turning around in driveways.  For your child's safety please try to have them leave your car from the sidewalk side of the car.
Please do not block our neighbors driveway, even for a few minutes.
Tuition:
As I receive payments I update the statement and send you a copy.  If you do not receive those from me please let me 
know.
Hours
Morning Care 7:30-8:30am
Morning Drop off is between 8:30-9am
Afternoon Pick Up is between 3:10- 3:20pm
Extended Day 3:20-5:30/5:45pm
South Orange Country Day School
461 Vose Avenue, South Orange
973.762.6451
You are receiving this email because your child attends SOCDS.  If you no longer wish to receive these updates, please unsubscribe below.
